title: nerine aurea
intro: Nerine aurea, also known as the Corn Lily or Sea Leek, is a perennial bulbous plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion. The health benefits of Nerine aurea include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
